title: The Bustan
author: Saadi
description: Join with Sádi and his Reflection of Magical Words همانا که در فارس انشای من چو مشک است بی قیمت اندر ختن گل آورد سعدی سوی بوستان به شوخی و فلفل به هندوستان In Persia, my writings are, doubtless, thought nice; As musk is in Cathay esteemed beyond price. To the garden brought Sádi, with boldness, a rose, As they do spice to India, where spice freely grows. Bustan, a literary masterpiece by the renowned Persian poet Musleh al-Din Bin Abdallah Saadi Shirazi, is a collection of stories that showcases...
